company.name: Senus PLC
company.sector: Climate risk and soil health intelligence technology
company.hq: Block D, Daneswell Business Centre, Monksland, Athlone, Co. Roscommon, Ireland

source.primary_document: Senus PLC Information Document, December 2025 (Direct Listing on Euronext Access)
source.h1_document: Senus PLC Half Year Results for the 6 months ended 31 December 2025, published 19 March 2026
source.h1_note: Published via the Assiduous-sponsored investor portal (app.assiduous.tech/investor-relations/senus) and senus.com/investors, both requiring authentication not available through public web search/fetch. Obtained directly and manually cross-checked against the P&L, Balance Sheet and Cash Flow Statement in the source document before being added below.
source.h1_figures_status: Unaudited (condensed interim financial statements per FRS 102 / Companies Act 2014, approved by the Board 18 March 2026).

annual_financials.source_document: Senus PLC Half Year Results (comparative period), 19 Mar 2026
annual_financials.source_section: Consolidated P&L / Balance Sheet / Cash Flow, comparatives column

annual_financials.source_document: Senus PLC Half Year Results for the 6 months ended 31 December 2025, published 19 Mar 2026
annual_financials.source_section: Consolidated P&L / Balance Sheet / Cash Flow Statement

post_period_events.detail: Acquired UK geospatial AI partner Loamin Ltd. Goodwill of EUR 669,550 recognised; no cash consideration paid on completion; contingent consideration of EUR 850,000 recognised, payable only if performance targets are achieved.
Gross proceeds of EUR 1.1m raised ahead of Direct Listing (EUR 1,138,683 recognised in H1 FY2026 financing cash flows), at a post-money enterprise valuation of EUR 13.1m.
Admission to trading on Euronext Access+ Dublin.

post_period_events.event: H1 FY2026 Half Year Results published
post_period_events.detail: Unaudited results for the six months ended 31 December 2025. Revenue up 4.1% to EUR 354.8k; cash balance EUR 735.2k at period end after the equity raise; bank debt EUR 76.5k.

disclosure_gaps: EBITDA: D&A not fully broken out in FY2024/FY2025 summarised financials (H1 FY2026 does disclose depreciation of EUR 10,014 in the cash flow statement, but this is not present for the earlier audited years on a comparable basis) — not shown as a headline metric rather than estimated inconsistently across periods.

Current Ratio: FY2024/FY2025 only disclose specific components (debtors, creditors, cash), not full current asset/liability totals; H1 FY2026 does disclose full current assets/liabilities, so this becomes computable from H1 FY2026 onward — noted as a metric gap that closes over time as reporting granularity improves.
DSCR: interest expense is disclosed for H1 FY2026 (EUR 1,391) but no loan amortisation schedule is available in any period, so a genuine DSCR still cannot be computed.

ROCE: FY2025 closed with net liabilities — denominator near zero/negative, metric not meaningful for that period specifically. Net assets turned positive again in H1 FY2026 (EUR 561,081), so ROCE becomes potentially meaningful again from FY2026 onward once a full-year EBIT figure exists.
